zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bramshott於大約1445年出生在英國素可時，她的父親John Bramshot22歲，母親Katherine Pelham18歲。她於1460年之前與John Dudley Esq.在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年10月12日在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國素可阿盧德爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bramshott于大约1445年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲John Bramshot22岁，母亲Katherine Pelham18岁。她于1460年之前与John Dudley Esq.在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年10月12日在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国素可阿盧德爾。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bramshott was born about 1445, in Sussex, England, her father, John Bramshot, was 22 and her mother, Katherine Pelham, was 18. She married John Dudley Esq. before 1460, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 October 1499, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Arundel, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bramshott est née environ 1445, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Bramshot, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherine Pelham, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Dudley Esq. avant 1460, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1499, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bramshott um 1445 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bramshot 22 und ihre Mutter Katherine Pelham 18. Sie hat vor 1460 in England John Dudley Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1499 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Arundel, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bramshott è nata il circa 1445 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, John Bramshot, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Katherine Pelham, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Dudley Esq. prima del 1460, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1499, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Arundel, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bramshottが約1445年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父John Bramshotは22歳，母Katherine Pelhamは18歳であった。1460年以前にイギリスでJohn Dudley Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年10月12日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススセックスアルンデルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bramshott(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bramshot(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Pelham(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1460년 이전 영국에서 John Dudley Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 10월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 아런들에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bramshott nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bramshot, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Pelham, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Dudley Esq. antes 1460, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1499, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bramshott родилась около 1445 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bramshot было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Pelham, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Dudley Esq. перед 1460 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 октября 1499 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bramshott nació aproximadamente 1445, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bramshot, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Katherine Pelham, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Dudley Esq. antes de 1460, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1499, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra.
